01381a4f1e13.title: Get your menu online — 77% of diners check before visiting
01381a4f1e13.description: No online menu found. Most diners check the menu before committing. Without one, you lose the customer at the decision point.
01381a4f1e13.management_implication: Every day without a menu is a percentage of potential customers lost.

0a0a5ac254b6.title: Renew formal trust proof before it becomes a visible drag
0a0a5ac254b6.description: Last inspected 2.0 years ago. A stale inspection date erodes trust scoring and signals to customers that compliance isn't actively managed. Request a voluntary re-inspection once you're confident of a strong result.
0a0a5ac254b6.expected_upside: Fresh compliance proof, trust signal renewal
0a0a5ac254b6.management_implication: Stale trust is a hidden ceiling on your overall position.

13c852047ded.title: Establish basic web presence — you don't exist online beyond Google
13c852047ded.description: No website, Facebook, or Instagram detected. Even a basic page improves discoverability and gives customers a reason to trust you before visiting.

044d5b9bfdf3.title: Fix the digital shopfront — you're losing walk-ins
044d5b9bfdf3.description: You deliver a strong experience but your online presence doesn't make it easy to act on. Can a new customer confirm your hours, see your menu, and book — all within 60 seconds on their phone? If not, that's your fix list.
044d5b9bfdf3.management_implication: Interest without conversion is vanity traffic.

b72803602800.title: Protect the 4.9/5 rating — it took years to build
b72803602800.description: With 1239 reviews at 4.9/5, your discovery advantage is substantial. Protect it by responding to every review within 48 hours and prompting satisfied tables for feedback.
